# kdaisyui — llms.txt

> Type-safe DaisyUI component DSL for Kotlin kotlinx.html.
> Wraps Tailwind CSS classes into compile-time-checked Kotlin extension functions.
> No frontend build tools required. No JavaScript frameworks. Just Kotlin.

## Quick start

### Dependency

```kotlin
// build.gradle.kts
repositories {
    mavenCentral()
    maven("https://maven.pkg.github.com/ollin/kdaisyui")
}

dependencies {
    implementation("io.github.ollin.kdaisyui:kdaisyui:5.5.19-1")
}
```

### Import

```kotlin
import io.github.ollin.kdaisyui.components.*
```

### Minimal example

```kotlin
import io.github.ollin.kdaisyui.components.*
import kotlinx.html.div
import kotlinx.html.stream.createHTML

val html = createHTML().div {
    daisyButton("Deploy", variant = ButtonVariant.Primary, size = ButtonSize.Lg)
}
// → <div><button class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Deploy</button></div>
```

## Common parameters

Every component accepts these escape-hatch parameters:

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `extraClasses` | `String?` | Additional CSS classes, merged safely (no duplicates) |
| `attrs` | `(TAG.() -> Unit)?` | Direct access to the underlying kotlinx.html tag |
| `content` | `(TAG.() -> Unit)?` | Nested HTML content (some components require this) |

## Naming conventions

- CSS `btn-primary` → Kotlin `ButtonVariant.Primary`
- CSS `btn-lg` → Kotlin `ButtonSize.Lg`
- Boolean params map directly: `outline = true` → CSS class `btn-outline`
- All components are `FlowContent.daisyXxx()` extension functions
- Variant enums: `XxxVariant`, Size enums: `XxxSize`
- Both have `internal val className: String`

## Available components (63)

| Component | Function | Description | Variants | Sizes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Alert | `daisyAlert` | Status messages and notifications | Info, Success, Warning, Error | — |
| Avatar | `daisyAvatar` | User and entity representations | — | — |
| Badge | `daisyBadge` | Labels, counts, and status tags | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Breadcrumbs | `daisyBreadcrumbs` | Navigation trail | — | — |
| Button | `daisyButton` | Actions and triggers | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Calendar | `daisyCalendar` | Date picker | — | — |
| Card | `daisyCard`, `daisyCardTitle`, `daisyCardBody`, `daisyCardActions` | Content containers | — | Xs–Xl |
| Carousel | `daisyCarousel` | Image/content slider | — | — |
| Chat | `daisyChat` | Chat message bubbles | — | — |
| Checkbox | `daisyCheckbox` | Boolean toggles for forms | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Collapse | `daisyCollapse` | Collapsible content sections | — | — |
| Countdown | `daisyCountdown` | Timer/countdown display | — | — |
| Diff | `daisyDiff` | Side-by-side comparison | — | — |
| Divider | `daisyDivider` | Visual separators | — | — |
| Dock | `daisyDock` | macOS-style dock | — | — |
| Drawer | `daisyDrawer`, `daisyDrawerToggle`, `daisyDrawerContent`, `daisyDrawerSide`, `daisyDrawerOverlay` | Sidebar layout with toggle | — | — |
| Dropdown | `daisyDropdown`, `daisyDropdownContent` | Context menus and action lists | — | — |
| Fab | `daisyFab` | Floating action button | — | — |
| Fieldset | `daisyFieldset` | Groups related form controls | — | — |
| FileInput | `daisyFileInput` | File upload fields | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Filter | `daisyFilter` | Filter controls | — | — |
| Footer | `daisyFooter` | Page footer | — | — |
| Hero | `daisyHero` | Full-width hero sections | — | — |
| Hover3d | `daisyHover3d` | 3D hover effect | — | — |
| HoverGallery | `daisyHoverGallery` | Image gallery with hover | — | — |
| Indicator | `daisyIndicator`, `daisyIndicatorItem` | Overlay badges on elements | — | — |
| Input | `daisyInput` | Text entry fields | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Join | `daisyJoin` | Groups buttons and inputs | — | — |
| Kbd | `daisyKbd` | Keyboard key display | — | Xs–Xl |
| Label | `daisyLabel` | Field labels and helper text | — | — |
| Link | `daisyLink` | Styled anchor elements | 7 colors | — |
| List | `daisyList` | Styled list | — | — |
| Loading | `daisyLoading` | Loading spinners | — | Xs–Xl |
| Mask | `daisyMask` | CSS mask shapes | — | — |
| Menu | `daisyMenu`, `daisyMenuTitle`, `daisyMenuDropdown`, `daisyMenuDropdownToggle` | Navigation lists with submenus | — | Xs–Xl |
| MockupBrowser | `daisyMockupBrowser` | Browser frame mockup | — | — |
| MockupCode | `daisyMockupCode` | Code block mockup | — | — |
| MockupPhone | `daisyMockupPhone` | Phone frame mockup | — | — |
| MockupWindow | `daisyMockupWindow` | Window frame mockup | — | — |
| Modal | `daisyModal`, `daisyModalBox`, `daisyModalAction`, `daisyModalBackdrop` | Modal dialogs | — | — |
| Navbar | `daisyNavbar` | Top navigation bar | — | — |
| Progress | `daisyProgress` | Progress bars | — | — |
| RadialProgress | `daisyRadialProgress` | Circular progress indicator | — | — |
| Radio | `daisyRadio` | Single-choice option groups | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Range | `daisyRange` | Slider for numeric ranges | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Rating | `daisyRating` | Star rating input | — | — |
| Select | `daisySelect` | Dropdown option pickers | 7 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Skeleton | `daisySkeleton` | Loading placeholder | — | — |
| Stack | `daisyStack` | Overlapping stack layout | — | — |
| Stat | `daisyStat`, `daisyStatStat`, `daisyStatStatTitle`, `daisyStatStatValue`, `daisyStatStatDesc`, `daisyStatStatFigure`, `daisyStatStatActions` | Key metrics and numbers | — | — |
| Status | `daisyStatus` | Status indicators | — | — |
| Steps | `daisySteps`, `daisyStep` | Step progress indicators | — | Xs–Xl |
| Swap | `daisySwap` | Toggle between two states | — | — |
| Tab | `daisyTab` | Tab navigation | — | Xs–Xl |
| Table | `daisyTable` | Structured data in rows | — | — |
| Textarea | `daisyTextarea` | Multi-line text input | — | Xs–Xl |
| TextRotate | `daisyTextRotate` | Rotated text display | — | — |
| ThemeController | `daisyThemeController` | Theme switcher | — | — |
| Timeline | `daisyTimeline` | Vertical chronological display | — | — |
| Toast | `daisyToast` | Notification popups | — | — |
| Toggle | `daisyToggle` | Switch-style boolean input | 8 colors | Xs–Xl |
| Tooltip | `daisyTooltip` | Hover information popup | — | — |
| Validator | `daisyValidator` | Form validation wrapper | — | — |

## Common variant values

Most color variant enums follow the same pattern:

```
Neutral, Primary, Secondary, Accent, Info, Success, Warning, Error
```

Size enums:

```
Xs, Sm, Md, Lg, Xl
```

## Core utility

```kotlin
import io.github.ollin.kdaisyui.core.addClassNames

// Merges CSS classes safely — deduplicates, preserves order
div {
    addClassNames("flex items-center gap-4")
}
```

## Detailed component signatures

### Alert

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyAlert(
    variant: AlertVariant? = null,   // Info | Success | Warning | Error
    dash: Boolean = false,
    horizontal: Boolean = false,
    outline: Boolean = false,
    soft: Boolean = false,
    vertical: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIV.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIV.() -> Unit),
)

daisyAlert(variant = AlertVariant.Success) {
    span { +"Pipeline completed successfully." }
}
```

### Avatar

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyAvatar(
    offline: Boolean = false,
    online: Boolean = false,
    placeholder: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIV.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIV.() -> Unit),
)

daisyAvatar(online = true) {
    div("w-12 rounded-full") { img(src = "user.jpg") }
}
```

### Badge

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyBadge(
    text: String? = null,
    variant: BadgeVariant? = null,   // 8 colors
    size: BadgeSize? = null,         // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    dash: Boolean = false,
    ghost: Boolean = false,
    outline: Boolean = false,
    soft: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (SPAN.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (SPAN.() -> Unit)? = null,
)

daisyBadge("Passing", variant = BadgeVariant.Success)
daisyBadge("3", variant = BadgeVariant.Error, size = BadgeSize.Sm)
```

### Button

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyButton(
    text: String? = null,
    variant: ButtonVariant? = null,  // 8 colors
    size: ButtonSize? = null,        // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    active: Boolean = false,
    block: Boolean = false,
    circle: Boolean = false,
    dash: Boolean = false,
    ghost: Boolean = false,
    link: Boolean = false,
    outline: Boolean = false,
    soft: Boolean = false,
    square: Boolean = false,
    wide: Boolean = false,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    type: ButtonType? = null,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (BUTTON.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (BUTTON.() -> Unit)? = null,
)

daisyButton("Deploy", variant = ButtonVariant.Primary)
daisyButton("Cancel", variant = ButtonVariant.Ghost)
daisyButton("Delete", variant = ButtonVariant.Error, outline = true, size = ButtonSize.Sm)
```

### Card

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyCard(
    size: CardSize? = null,          // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    border: Boolean = false,
    dash: Boolean = false,
    imageFull: Boolean = false,
    side: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIV.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIV.() -> Unit),
)
fun FlowContent.daisyCardTitle(text: String? = null, extraClasses, attrs, content)
fun FlowContent.daisyCardBody(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))
fun FlowContent.daisyCardActions(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))

daisyCard(extraClasses = "bg-base-100 shadow-xs") {
    daisyCardBody {
        daisyCardTitle { +"Pipeline Status" }
        p { +"api-gateway · main · 2m 14s" }
        daisyCardActions {
            daisyButton("View logs", variant = ButtonVariant.Primary, size = ButtonSize.Sm)
        }
    }
}
```

### Checkbox

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyCheckbox(
    variant: CheckboxVariant? = null,  // 8 colors
    size: CheckboxSize? = null,        // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    checked: Boolean = false,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (INPUT.() -> Unit)? = null,
)

label("flex cursor-pointer gap-4") {
    daisyCheckbox(size = CheckboxSize.Sm, checked = true)
    span("label-text") { +"Branch protection enabled" }
}
```

### Drawer

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyDrawer(
    end: Boolean = false,
    open: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIV.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIV.() -> Unit),
)
fun FlowContent.daisyDrawerToggle(extraClasses, attrs, content)
fun FlowContent.daisyDrawerContent(extraClasses, attrs, content)
fun FlowContent.daisyDrawerSide(extraClasses, attrs, content)
fun FlowContent.daisyDrawerOverlay(extraClasses, attrs, content: (LABEL.() -> Unit))

daisyDrawer(extraClasses = "lg:drawer-open") {
    daisyDrawerToggle { /* checkbox input */ }
    daisyDrawerContent { /* main content */ }
    daisyDrawerSide { /* sidebar nav */ }
}
```

### Dropdown

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyDropdown(
    close: Boolean = false,
    hover: Boolean = false,
    open: Boolean = false,
    end: Boolean = false, start: Boolean = false,
    top: Boolean = false, bottom: Boolean = false,
    left: Boolean = false, right: Boolean = false,
    center: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DETAILS.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DETAILS.() -> Unit),
)
fun FlowContent.daisyDropdownContent(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))
```

### Input

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyInput(
    variant: InputVariant? = null,    // 8 colors
    size: InputSize? = null,          // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    ghost: Boolean = false,
    type: InputType = InputType.text,
    placeholder: String? = null,
    value: String? = null,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (INPUT.() -> Unit)? = null,
)

daisyInput(placeholder = "Search...", extraClasses = "w-full")
```

### Join

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyJoin(
    horizontal: Boolean = false,
    vertical: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIV.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIV.() -> Unit),
)

// Add extraClasses = "join-item" to each child
daisyJoin {
    daisyButton("«", extraClasses = "join-item")
    daisyButton("1", extraClasses = "join-item")
}
```

### Menu

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyMenu(
    size: MenuSize? = null,   // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    horizontal: Boolean = false,
    vertical: Boolean = false,
    // ...more params
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (UL.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (UL.() -> Unit),
)
fun FlowContent.daisyMenuTitle(text: String? = null, extraClasses, attrs, content)
```

### Modal

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyModal(
    bottom: Boolean = false, end: Boolean = false,
    middle: Boolean = false, open: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (DIALOG.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (DIALOG.() -> Unit),
)
fun FlowContent.daisyModalBox(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))
fun FlowContent.daisyModalAction(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))
fun FlowContent.daisyModalBackdrop(extraClasses, attrs, content: (DIV.() -> Unit))

daisyModal(open = true) {
    daisyModalBox { h3("text-lg font-bold") { +"Edit Profile" } }
    daisyModalBackdrop { }
}
```

### Radio

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyRadio(
    variant: RadioVariant? = null,   // 8 colors
    size: RadioSize? = null,         // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    name: String? = null,
    checked: Boolean = false,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (INPUT.() -> Unit)? = null,
)
```

### Select

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisySelect(
    variant: SelectVariant? = null,   // 7 colors
    size: SelectSize? = null,         // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    ghost: Boolean = false,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (SELECT.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (SELECT.() -> Unit),
)

daisySelect(extraClasses = "w-full") {
    option { +"Option A" }
    option { +"Option B" }
}
```

### Stats

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyStat(horizontal: Boolean = false, vertical: Boolean = false, ...)
fun FlowContent.daisyStatStat(extraClasses, attrs, content)
fun FlowContent.daisyStatStatTitle(text: String? = null, ...)
fun FlowContent.daisyStatStatValue(text: String? = null, ...)
fun FlowContent.daisyStatStatDesc(text: String? = null, ...)
```

### Swap

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisySwap(
    rotate: Boolean = false,
    flip: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (LABEL.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (LABEL.() -> Unit),
)

daisySwap(rotate = true) {
    span("swap-on text-2xl") { +"🌙" }
    span("swap-off text-2xl") { +"☀️" }
}
```

### Table

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyTable(
    zebra: Boolean = false,
    pin: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (TABLE.() -> Unit)? = null,
    content: (TABLE.() -> Unit),
)
```

### Toggle

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyToggle(
    variant: ToggleVariant? = null,   // 8 colors
    size: ToggleSize? = null,         // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    checked: Boolean = false,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (INPUT.() -> Unit)? = null,
)
```

### Range

```kotlin
fun FlowContent.daisyRange(
    variant: RangeVariant? = null,    // 8 colors
    size: RangeSize? = null,          // Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl
    min: String? = null, max: String? = null,
    value: String? = null, step: String? = null,
    disabled: Boolean = false,
    extraClasses: String? = null,
    attrs: (INPUT.() -> Unit)? = null,
)
```

## Requirements

- JDK 21+ (see `.tool-versions`)
- Kotlin 2.3.10, kotlinx-html 0.12.0
- DaisyUI 5.5.19

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/ollin/kdaisyui
- DaisyUI: https://daisyui.com
- kotlinx.html: https://github.com/Kotlin/kotlinx.html
